title: AIDS Diva: The Legend of Connie Norman
original_title: AIDS Diva: The Legend of Connie Norman
overview: Seizing her power as she confronts her mortality, trailblazing trans activist Connie Norman evolves as an irrepressible, challenging and soulful voice for the AIDS and queer communities of early 90's Los Angeles.
